title: [codereview-pass1] tx_buf addition increases RAM usage by up to 176 bytes per adapter instance
description: The new tx_buf[LICHEN_MESHCORE_FRAME_MAX] in struct lichen_meshcore_adapter adds permanent allocation. Document this in Kconfig help text and consider if static per-adapter is acceptable or if a shared pool / smaller buffer is better for STM32WL. P4 readability/maintainability.
